name: Lafayette Digital Acquisition Corp. I
business: Lafayette Digital Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company incorporated in the Cayman Islands. It has no operations and has not generated any revenue. The company intends to focus its initial business combination on financial services and technology industries, with emphasis on blockchain, digital assets, fintech, artificial intelligence, encryption, cybersecurity, and compute hardware.

exposures.sentence: Areas of emphasis include blockchain-enabled financial infrastructure and the broader digital-asset ecosystem, financial technology and payments, artificial-intelligence-enabled financial software, encryption and cybersecurity, and enabling compute and hardware.

Across opportunities, we prioritize lawful, standards-aligned operations while preserving the benefits of open, permissionless architectures. While we remain open to all opportunities, we expect to prioritize opportunities aligned with Ethereum and its broader ecosystem.

catalysts.event: Deadline to complete initial business combination
catalysts.sentence: We have until the date that is 24 months from the closing of the IPO (as may be extended by shareholder approval to amend our amended and restated memorandum and articles of association to extend the date by which we must consummate our initial business combination) (the completion window) to consummate our initial business combination or until such earlier liquidation date as our board of directors may approve.
